name: Focaccia Bread W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the tomatoes and Parmesan cheese in the bread machine.
2. Program the machine for Raisin Bread, Basic Bread, Basic Wheat, Basic White, or White/Whole Grain.
3. Press Start or On.
4. Add the tomatoes and cheese when the beeper sounds or during the last 5 minutes of the final knead cycle.
